headline: A product-focused profile that is clean and concrete.

sections.title: Who I am
sections.body: I am Faniry Ranaivoson, a software engineer passionate about building solid interfaces and useful systems. I work with a pragmatic mindset, aiming to turn real needs into clear and reliable experiences.

sections.title: My value and mindset
sections.body: I enjoy building applications that are clean, readable, and easy to evolve, while keeping a strong eye on detail. My preferred technologies revolve around React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Spring Boot, and Java, with a strong interest in well-designed architectures.

sections.title: What I am looking for
sections.body: With first experience gained through a few professional freelance projects, I am now looking for an internship or a first role to keep learning, contribute to real products, and grow in a demanding environment.

sections.title: The human bonus
sections.body: Outside of code, I enjoy illustration, creative projects, and ideas that mix technology, design, and meaning.
